sprint: Egg and Lumo Removed From the Gate Scene
task: "remove egg and lumo from the scene. let it be just the gate. welcome traveller and open the gate. in next scene let lumo interact with the traveller." The prior "Lumo Guards the Gate" model mounted the Gate, the Story Egg, and Lumo together the instant the sequence began, with Lumo standing beside the Gate through the whole opening/journey/arrival/awaken sequence -- this restructures it: Scene 2 becomes Gate-only and synchronous (mountGates() dropped its egg parameter and all Egg DOM creation; resolveEgg() deleted entirely as now-genuinely-unused; the old Promise.all wait for Lumo+Egg is gone, so the Gate mounts with zero async delay). Scene 3's greeting/recognition lines are completely unchanged, now heard rather than witnessed since nobody is on screen but the Gate. Scenes 4-6 proceed with the Gate entirely alone -- playGateAwaken dropped its lumoRef parameter and the wing-raise/Egg-brighten toggles; the magic sparks and rune-ignite halo pulse still fire, now read as the Gate awakening and opening itself, with nobody beside it. A new Scene 7 -- Lumo Arrives -- runs once the doors finish opening: a new playLumoArrival() (nested inside begin() for closure access to lumoRef/cleanupLumo) resolves Lumo via the unchanged resolveLumo(), calls the completely unmodified mountLumo(), raises Lumo's wing as a welcoming gesture, and speaks one of two new short arrival lines (LUMO_ARRIVAL_LINES for a first-time Traveller, LUMO_ARRIVAL_RETURNING_LINES for a Returning Creator) before the existing camera dolly + threshold flash run. The Hall is still never visible before that moment, for anyone. Verified via a new 24-assertion Playwright suite confirming the Gate mounts alone, the greeting plays with nobody visible, Journey/Arrival/Awaken proceed with no Lumo, Lumo mounts only in Scene 7 and speaks the correct line, the Returning-Creator path works identically with its own distinct reunion line, tap-to-skip and reduced motion both still work -- plus the pre-existing full-screen-coverage suite (updated to check Lumo's visibility at Scene 7 instead of Scene 2) and the pre-existing Lumo-flying-video suite (mount-wait timeout widened to match the later mounting point). Both goldenBuild.js suites pass unchanged. No Theme Contract/Engine V2 Scene Model/Builder/Creator Governing Rules change; confined to js/gatewaySequence.js and css/style.css, with a matching cache-bust version bump on both stylesheet <link> tags in index.html.
